column1: The teacher was a stranger to me. I never (see) her before.
The house was very quiet when I (get) home.
She gave him the book his teacher (recommend).
She got a message saying he (pass) the exam.
We (go) out to buy a drink, but the pub (close).
She (go on) with the story where her Mother (stop).
Tom wasn’t at home when I (arrive). He just (go) home.
